name: Apple Oatmeal Raisin
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients: In a large bowl, mix together 2/3 cup apple juice, 1 tbsp butter or margarine, 1/2 tsp salt, 1/4 tsp cinnamon, 1 tbsp brown sugar, 2 tbsp oat bran, 1 cup oats, and 1 cup bread flour. Stir until well combined.
2. Add the remaining ingredients: At beep, add 1/3 cup raisins, 1/3 cup diced apple, and 1/4 cup chopped nuts (optional).
3. Mix everything together thoroughly to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased bread machine pan or loaf pan lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake according to your bread machine's instructions until the top is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the side.
6. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
